      <a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"result__a\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FPHYSICS%2F143B%2F&amp;rut=39f90624d3ff9e7ed3c1b051794e419fdea39092fe8708e675b3cc98f6ad7385\">PHYSICS 143B - Quantum Mechanics II at Harvard University - Coursicle</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n                        <div class=\"result__extras__url\">\n                          <span class=\"result__icon\">\n                            <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FPHYSICS%2F143B%2F&amp;rut=39f90624d3ff9e7ed3c1b051794e419fdea39092fe8708e675b3cc98f6ad7385\">\n                              <img class=\"result__icon__img\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" alt=\"\" src=\"//external-content.duckduckgo.com/ip3/www.coursicle.com.ico\" name=\"i15\" />\n                            </a>\n                          </span>\n                          <a class=\"result__url\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FPHYSICS%2F143B%2F&amp;rut=39f90624d3ff9e7ed3c1b051794e419fdea39092fe8708e675b3cc98f6ad7385\">\n                            www.coursicle.com/harvard/courses/PHYSICS/143B/\n                          </a>\n                          \n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    \n\n                    \n                      \n                        <a class=\"result__snippet\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FPHYSICS%2F143B%2F&amp;rut=39f90624d3ff9e7ed3c1b051794e419fdea39092fe8708e675b3cc98f6ad7385\">PHYSICS 143B at <b>Harvard University</b> (Harvard) in Cambridge, Massachusetts. Introduction to path integrals, identical particles, many-electron theory, WKB approximation, time-dependent perturbation theory, scattering theory, relativistic <b>quantum mechanics</b>, and basics of quantum information.</a>\n                      \n                    \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n              \n                <div class=\"result results_links results_links_deep web-result \">\n                  <div class=\"links_main links_deep result__body\"> <!-- This is the visible part -->\n                    \n                      <h2 class=\"result__title\">\n                        <a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"result__a\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FENGSCI%2F170%2F&amp;rut=ad71498805e31ec38892c5af9ce86501866eac3fb42f79b949c2a2655277a22a\">ENGSCI 170 - Engineering Quantum Mechanics at Harvard University ...</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n                        <div class=\"result__extras__url\">\n                          <span class=\"result__icon\">\n                            <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FENGSCI%2F170%2F&amp;rut=ad71498805e31ec38892c5af9ce86501866eac3fb42f79b949c2a2655277a22a\">\n                              <img class=\"result__icon__img\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" alt=\"\" src=\"//external-content.duckduckgo.com/ip3/www.coursicle.com.ico\" name=\"i15\" />\n                            </a>\n                          </span>\n                          <a class=\"result__url\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FENGSCI%2F170%2F&amp;rut=ad71498805e31ec38892c5af9ce86501866eac3fb42f79b949c2a2655277a22a\">\n                            www.coursicle.com/harvard/courses/ENGSCI/170/\n                          </a>\n                          \n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    \n\n                    \n                      \n                        <a class=\"result__snippet\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.coursicle.com%2Fharvard%2Fcourses%2FENGSCI%2F170%2F&amp;rut=ad71498805e31ec38892c5af9ce86501866eac3fb42f79b949c2a2655277a22a\">ENGSCI 170 at <b>Harvard University</b> (Harvard) in Cambridge, Massachusetts. As a first course in <b>quantum mechanics</b>, tailored for engineering, applied mathematics and computer science students, this course will teach concepts needed to engineer a quantum world, to understand quantum mechanical properties of materials and build an intuition for quantum information science. The course will be a ...</a>\n                      \n                    \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n 251a : Quantum Mechanics - Harvard University - Course Hero</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n   \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n              \n                <div class=\"result results_links class=\"result__title\">\n                        <a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"result__a\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdoc%2F181608088%2Fsyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=4bcfacae064c2556660012b215aec3f37e747a3c344eab5b2cb0b73a2d196cd5\">Harvard Physics 143b: Quantum Mechanics II</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n                        <div class=\"result__extras__url\">\n                          <span class=\"result__icon\">\n                            <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdoc%2F181608088%2Fsyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=4bcfacae064c2556660012b215aec3f37e747a3c344eab5b2cb0b73a2d196cd5\">\n                              <img class=\"result__icon__img\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" alt=\"\" src=\"//external-content.duckduckgo.com/ip3/www.scribd.com.ico\" name=\"i15\" />\n                            </a>\n                          </span>\n                          <a class=\"result__url\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdoc%2F181608088%2Fsyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=4bcfacae064c2556660012b215aec3f37e747a3c344eab5b2cb0b73a2d196cd5\">\n                            www.scribd.com/doc/181608088/syllabus-pdf\n                          </a>\n                          \n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    \n\n                    \n                      \n                        <a class=\"result__snippet\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.scribd.com%2Fdoc%2F181608088%2Fsyllabus%2Dpdf&amp;rut=4bcfacae064c2556660012b215aec3f37e747a3c344eab5b2cb0b73a2d196cd5\">This document provides information about the Physics 143b: <b>Quantum Mechanics</b> II course offered at <b>Harvard University</b> in Fall 2010, including an outline of topics to be covered over the term. The course is intended as the second part of an introductory <b>quantum mechanics</b> course, assuming familiarity with concepts from Part I of the <b>textbook</b>. Over the term, the course will cover advanced topics ...</a>\n                      \n                    \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n              \n                <div class=\"result results_links results_links_deep web-result \">\n                  <div class=\"links_main links_deep result__body\"> <!-- This is the visible part -->\n                    \n                      <h2 class=\"result__title\">\n                        <a rel=\"nofollow\" class=\"result__a\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fcoursetexts%2Dnotion%2Fyin%2Dphysics253a%2Fsyllabus%2520Physics%2520253a.pdf&amp;rut=6a704c90cdee86c809b759ea8166d72caae89444d282c274361d0957027792f9\"><span class=\"result__type\">PDF</span> Physics 253a: Quantum Field Theory I Harvard University, Fall 2022 ...</a>\n                      </h2>\n\n                    \n\n                    \n                      <div class=\"result__extras\">\n                        <div class=\"result__extras__url\">\n                          <span class=\"result__icon\">\n                            <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fcoursetexts%2Dnotion%2Fyin%2Dphysics253a%2Fsyllabus%2520Physics%2520253a.pdf&amp;rut=6a704c90cdee86c809b759ea8166d72caae89444d282c274361d0957027792f9\">\n                              <img class=\"result__icon__img\" width=\"16\" height=\"16\" alt=\"\" src=\"//external-content.duckduckgo.com/ip3/storage.googleapis.com.ico\" name=\"i15\" />\n                            </a>\n                          </span>\n                          <a class=\"result__url\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fcoursetexts%2Dnotion%2Fyin%2Dphysics253a%2Fsyllabus%2520Physics%2520253a.pdf&amp;rut=6a704c90cdee86c809b759ea8166d72caae89444d282c274361d0957027792f9\">\n                            storage.googleapis.com/coursetexts-notion/yin-physics253a/syllabus Physics 253a.pdf\n                          </a>\n                          \n                        </div>\n                      </div>\n                    \n\n                    \n                      \n                        <a class=\"result__snippet\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/l/?uddg=https%3A%2F%2Fstorage.googleapis.com%2Fcoursetexts%2Dnotion%2Fyin%2Dphysics253a%2Fsyllabus%2520Physics%2520253a.pdf&amp;rut=6a704c90cdee86c809b759ea8166d72caae89444d282c274361d0957027792f9\">Course Description: Path integral formulation of <b>quantum mechanics</b>, Lagrangian per-turbation theory, regularization, renormalization, and counter terms. Relativistic par-ticles and eld operators. 4 theory. Green functions. Feynman rules. The S-matrix. LSZ reduction formula. Particles with spin. Fermions. Gauge elds. Quantum elec-trodynamics and its applications.</a>\n                      \n                    \n\n                    <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n\n            \n              \n              \n                <div class=\"nav-link\">\n                  <form action=\"/html/\" method=\"post\">\n                    <input type=\"submit\" class='btn btn--alt' value=\"Next\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"q\" value=\"&quot;Harvard University&quot; &quot;quantum mechanics&quot; syllabus textbook\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"s\" value=\"10\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"nextParams\" value=\"\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"v\" value=\"l\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"o\" value=\"json\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"dc\" value=\"6\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"api\" value=\"d.js\" />\n                    <input type=\"hidden\" name=\"vqd\" value=\"4-199873081185676584895204108196059241052\" />\n\n                    \n                    \n                    \n                      <input name=\"kl\" value=\"wt-wt\" type=\"hidden\" />\n                    \n                    \n                    \n                    \n                  </form>\n                </div>\n              \n            \n\n            <div class=\"feedback-btn\">\n              <a rel=\"nofollow\" href=\"//duckduckgo.com/feedback.html\" target=\"_new\">Feedback</a>\n            </div>\n            <div class=\"clear\"></div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div> <!-- links wrapper //-->\n    \n  </div>\n\n  <div id=\"bottom_spacing2\"></div>\n\n  \n    <img src=\"//duckduckgo.com/t/sl_h\"/>\n  \n</body>\n</html>"}
